rebuild_strategy: Object-level editable recreation using native PowerPoint text boxes and primitive shapes; no full-page source raster and no cc-bridge text.

background_strategy.source_consistency_contract: Preserve the original off-white hand-drawn guide layout with native slide background, cards, arrows, badges, and callout shapes.
background_strategy.removed_foreground: All visible foreground text, cards, icons, arrows, badges, and takeaway elements are rebuilt as editable native objects rather than baked into a background image.
background_strategy.comparison_note: The background is plain off-white in the source and is recreated natively; no clean-base raster is used.

known_limits: Hand-drawn marker wobble, icon details, dashed preview styling, and mini browser chart are simplified with native primitives while preserving object-level editability.
qa_note: All readable labels are native text; service cards, log/web panels, badges, takeaway, and arrows are native editable shapes without full-slide raster usage.
